'''Daniel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who was paired up with a loved one during the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Festival of Love]]. [[L-O53]] tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with finding a loved one for Daniel. After searching the cities of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] and [[Kaadara]] during the Festival of Love, the spacer found a companion who shared similar interests with Daniel.

==Behind the scenes==
Daniel was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. He was in the game during the Ewok Festival of Love celebration of [[2009]]. During the event, players could pair up Daniel, as well as several other NPC's, with companions who shared similar interests.
